subject: DONE: 13/20 venues geocoded — ready for load
body:
Porter,

## Geocoding Complete

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Total venues | 20 |
| Geocoded | 13 |
| Failed | 7 (bad data) |

## Sample Geocoded Venues (by event count)

| Venue | City | Events | Coords |
|-------|------|--------|--------|
| Ripley Grier Studios | NYC | 21 | 40.778, -73.980 |
| Tango With Colette | San Diego | 20 | 32.717, -117.163 |
| Andy's Rehearsal Studios | NYC | 11 | 40.713, -74.006 |
| CPAA | San Jose | 10 | 37.310, -122.010 |
| The Tango Room | Sherman Oaks | 8 | 34.149, -118.431 |

## Sample Loadable Events (newly geocoded)

| Event | City | Date | Venue |
|-------|------|------|-------|
| Milonga Pizpireta | Chicago | Apr 2 | Artango Bar |
| MALA JUNTA | San Jose | Apr 2 | CPAA |
| Milonga Arrabal | LA | Apr 2 | 3509 Casitas Ave |
| Barcelona Tango Marathon | Barcelona | Apr 2 | La Nau Del Clot |
| LiveMoreTango | Livermore | Apr 2 | Terra Mia |

## Check Query

```sql
-- Events now loadable (have venue coords)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fb_events e
JOIN venues v ON e.venue_id = v.id
WHERE v.lat IS NOT NULL
  AND e.start_dt > datetime('now')
  AND e.classification NOT IN ('CLASS', 'UNKNOWN');
```

## Remaining 7 Ungeocodable Venues

These have bad/incomplete address data:

| ID | Name | Issue |
|----|------|-------|
| 802 | 1483 Ave. Mont-Royal Est | Montreal typo |
| 807 | Minneapolis, MN | City-as-venue |
| 833 | Emmanuel Pierre-Antoine | NYC studio, no city |
| 849 | You Should Be Dancing | NYC studio, no city |
| 850 | Balance Arts Center | NYC, bad address |
| 852 | Pearl Dance Studios | NYC, no city |
| 853 | Balance Arts Center | Duplicate of 850 |

These need manual coords or skip. Low event count — not blocking.

— Harvey
